name: get_equity_tradability
description: Check tradability for up to 10 equity symbols on a given account: per-session eligibility and fractional. Call before placing an order to surface restrictions. Exact-ticker match — no name or partial-ticker resolution.

account_number.description: Brokerage account number. Must come from the user or be clearly implied — never default from get_accounts.

symbols.description: Stock symbols, max 10 per call. With more than 10, split across multiple calls of 10 or fewer. Exact-ticker match only.
